preset_description: Dark = substance signal. Spotlights product capabilities and metrics. CTA and pricing are understated — features are the story, not conversion pressure.

brief.audience: AI-first, intent-aware design system for founding teams

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Slim hero providing immediate page context: confirms the visitor is in the right place (MODE for founding teams), establishes a concise page title and one-line value anchor before moving straight to the decision moment. Kept minimal per conversion-stage rules.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Validator archetype demands proof before committing. Inserting a focused proof-point block (key metrics, adoption numbers, or a compact case-study stat) satisfies the archetype's need for rational justification without expanding into a full consideration-depth layout.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Plan comparison and pricing framing positioned after evidence so the Validator can weigh options with proof still fresh. Clear tier differentiation reduces cognitive load and moves the visitor toward a confident choice.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Immediate CTA and commitment prompt following the decision beat. Captures action at peak intent — the Validator has seen proof and pricing and is ready to commit.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Final safety net: secondary paths (contact sales, explore docs, return to homepage) and footer. Catches any remaining hesitation and ensures no visitor exits without an alternative route.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Slim hero providing immediate page context: confirms the visitor is in the right place (MODE for founding teams), establishes a concise page title and one-line value anchor before moving straight to the decision moment. Kept minimal per conversion-stage rules.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Plan comparison and pricing framing positioned after evidence so the Validator can weigh options with proof still fresh. Clear tier differentiation reduces cognitive load and moves the visitor toward a confident choice.

sections.name: CTA
sections.rationale: Immediate CTA and commitment prompt following the decision beat. Captures action at peak intent — the Validator has seen proof and pricing and is ready to commit.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only. The persistent CTA in nav is the most converted element on most SaaS pages — never suppress it.
For conversion stage use text-only: slim title and subhead only, no media, no secondary CTA — orients the visitor without competing with the decision moment below.

slots.headline: The intelligence layer your design system was missing.
slots.subhead: Components that resolve behavior, emphasis, and copy register to the right experience — by archetype, funnel stage, and context. No manual variants.
slots.trust_signal: Lifetime access. No subscription. No runtime dependency.

page.reasoning: Validator variant includes description and longer feature list. highlighted variant for recommended plan — use sparingly (one per pricing section).

slots.description: The full intelligence layer. Resolution engine, component manifest, token config, palette map, IA planner, multi-variant generation, and Next.js preview UI. Yours forever.
features: Three palette presets, editable token dashboard
Next.js preview UI — renders agent output instantly
Lifetime access, no subscription, no lock-in

page.reasoning: Validator variant: include subhead and trust_signal (e.g., 'No credit card required').

slots.headline: One purchase. Permanent capability.
slots.subhead: MODE is running in under an hour. Configure once, own the intelligence layer forever.
slots.trust_signal: Lifetime access. No subscription. No credit card stored after purchase.

page.reasoning: with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows.
